mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, username, password_hash AS passwordHash, name, role_key AS roleKey, org_id AS orgId, enabled FROM users WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id AS userId, username, password_hash AS passwordHash, name, role_key AS roleKey, org_id AS orgId, enabled FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE 1=1
AND org_id = #{orgId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users(username, password_hash, name, role_key, org_id, enabled) VALUES(#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{roleKey}, #{orgId}, #{enabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password_hash = COALESCE(#{passwordHash}, password_hash), name = COALESCE(#{name}, name), role_key = COALESCE(#{roleKey}, role_key), org_id = #{orgId}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
